meta.intent: Teach that ignoring vine creates future cost by putting the clean center rescue lane on a visible growth path.
meta.expectedPath: Notice the center preview, clip the vine before it grows into the gap above the puppy, then continue opening the rescue lane with the side pairs.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player ignores the warning, lets the growth land in the center gap, and turns a clean rescue path into a slower reroute.
meta.whatItProves: Route urgency can be visual and fair.
meta.notes: The rebuilt tutorial preserves the empty preview cell above the puppy, but fills the surrounding board so the warned vine cost appears inside real play.
